nodes.label: index.html
nodes.summary: Main HTML document for Shikhar Gupta's Sun King APM application website. Single-page layout with 4 major sections: Navigation, Hero/Home, Video/Projects, Footer.

nodes.label: styles.css
nodes.summary: Complete CSS design system using CSS custom properties. Implements Sun King gold-on-dark brand palette, responsive breakpoints at 768px and 480px, glassmorphism effects, and scroll-triggered animations.

nodes.label: script.js
nodes.summary: Client-side JavaScript handling navigation, scroll animations (IntersectionObserver), video fallback logic, and active nav link tracking. No external dependencies.

nodes.label: Navigation
nodes.summary: Fixed top navbar with logo 'SG', 3 nav links (Home, Video, Projects), hamburger toggle for mobile, and a full-screen mobile nav overlay.

nodes.label: Hero / Home Section
nodes.summary: Full-viewport hero with ambient gold glows, profile picture (with fallback initials 'SG'), name/title, 3-paragraph bio, 4 action buttons (LinkedIn, GitHub, Portfolio, Resume), and scroll indicator.

nodes.label: Video Section (Deliverable 1)
nodes.summary: Project walkthrough video section tagged 'Deliverable 1'. Contains a 16:9 video player for 'walkthrough.mp4' with a styled fallback overlay that shows when the video isn't available.

nodes.label: Projects Section (Deliverable 2)
nodes.summary: Contains bridge blockquote, 5 project cards in a responsive grid, a portfolio CTA card, a featured build (dexterAI) video subsection, and a 'More About My Work' platforms grid with 3 placeholder cards.

nodes.label: Footer
nodes.summary: Site footer with 'SG' logo, tagline, external links (GitHub, LinkedIn, Portfolio, Email), and copyright notice.

nodes.label: Design Tokens (:root)
nodes.summary: CSS custom properties defining the entire visual language. Gold brand palette (--gold-primary: #CC9900 through --gold-glow), dark neutrals (--bg-body: #0A0A0A), spacing scale (xs to 2xl), typography scale (xs to 4xl), radius scale, and transition easing.

nodes.label: CSS Animations
nodes.summary: Four keyframe animations: glowPulse (L327-330, hero ambient glow), ringPulse (L394-397, profile ring), bounce (L496-499, scroll arrow), heroFadeIn (L918-921, initial hero reveal). Plus the .fade-up class (L901-911) that drives scroll-triggered reveal via JS.

nodes.label: Responsive Breakpoints
nodes.summary: Two breakpoints: 768px (tablet — hides desktop nav, shows hamburger, collapses grids to single-column, reduces font sizes) and 480px (mobile — stacks hero buttons vertically, shrinks profile picture from 130px to 100px).

nodes.label: initNavigation()
nodes.summary: Sets up: (1) sticky nav background change on scroll >50px, (2) hamburger toggle opening mobile overlay + locking body scroll, (3) auto-close mobile nav on link click, (4) smooth scrolling with 64px offset for all #anchor links.

nodes.label: initScrollAnimations()
nodes.summary: Uses IntersectionObserver (threshold 0.1, rootMargin '0px 0px -50px 0px') to add .visible class to .fade-up elements (excluding hero section). Observer unobserves after triggering (one-shot).

nodes.label: initVideoFallbacks()
nodes.summary: Initializes fallback overlays for both videos. Delegates to setupVideoFallback() which listens for loadedmetadata/canplay (hide fallback) and error events (show fallback), plus a 3-second timeout to show fallback if readyState < 1.

nodes.label: setupVideoFallback()
nodes.summary: Generic video fallback handler. Takes videoId and fallbackId, listens for media events to toggle .hidden class on fallback overlay. Includes 3-second timeout safety net.

nodes.label: initActiveNavTracking()
nodes.summary: Uses IntersectionObserver (threshold 0.3, rootMargin '-64px 0px -40% 0px') on all section[id] elements to toggle .active class on matching .nav-link elements.

nodes.label: assets/profile-pic.jpg
nodes.summary: Profile photograph displayed in the hero section. Has JS fallback that shows 'SG' initials div if image fails to load.

nodes.label: assets/walkthrough.mp4
nodes.summary: CRM redesign project walkthrough video, 4-minute duration, displayed in the Video section.

nodes.label: assets/dexterai.mp4
nodes.summary: dexterAI demo video displayed in the Featured Build subsection within Projects.

nodes.label: assets/images/platform-{1,2,3}.png
nodes.summary: Three placeholder platform screenshot images. Currently empty directory — images not yet added. The platform cards show 'Image coming soon' fallback via onerror handler.

nodes.label: Project: dexterAI
nodes.summary: Project #1. Local-first desktop AI workbench. Multi-provider LLM streaming, evaluations, autonomous agent. Links to github.com/leetcoderman/dexterAI.

nodes.label: Project: Telegram Bid Marketplace
nodes.summary: Project #2. Upload images on Telegram, AI generates product summaries, webapp for bidding with auth. Links to github.com/leetcoderman/Telegram-bid-marketplace.

nodes.label: Project: WhatsApp Group Prompting
nodes.summary: Project #3. AI agents in WhatsApp group with DB access + Google LLM APIs. Private — client safety.

nodes.label: Project: Client Websites — PGC
nodes.summary: Project #4. Website for Pratibha Gupta Classes. Links to 2 Vercel prototypes and GitHub repo.

nodes.label: Project: Pragmatix Internship
nodes.summary: Project #5. D2C coaching validation website built with AI tools. Private — client safety.

nodes.label: Google Fonts (Inter)
nodes.summary: External dependency: Inter font family loaded from Google Fonts CDN. Weights: 300,400,500,600,700,800.

nodes.label: SEO & Meta Tags
nodes.summary: Title: 'Shikhar Gupta — Sun King APM Application'. Meta description and OG tags present. No favicon or canonical URL defined.

edges.detail: Google Fonts CDN link for Inter
initNavigation() queries and controls all nav DOM elements
Manages scroll state, hamburger toggle, mobile overlay, smooth scroll
Adds .visible class to .fade-up elements, which triggers CSS transitions
Toggles .active class on nav links based on scroll position
Hero uses gold palette for glows, gradients, buttons; spacing tokens for layout
glowPulse, ringPulse, heroFadeIn, bounce all apply to hero elements
At 768px: reduces padding, btn size. At 480px: stacks buttons, shrinks profile pic
At 768px: projects-grid and platforms-grid collapse to single column

communities.label: Page Structure & Navigation
communities.summary: The HTML document structure. A single-page app with fixed nav, hero, video, projects, and footer sections. Navigation links provide smooth-scroll between sections.

communities.label: Visual Design System
communities.summary: The complete visual layer. Design tokens define the gold-on-dark brand palette. Animations provide ambient effects and scroll reveals. Responsive breakpoints at 768px/480px handle mobile.

communities.label: JavaScript Interactivity
communities.summary: Client-side behavior layer. Four init functions handle: nav scroll effects + mobile toggle, IntersectionObserver-based scroll animations, video error/fallback handling, and active nav link tracking.

communities.label: Project Content & Assets
communities.summary: The content layer — 5 portfolio projects and media assets. 3 projects have public GitHub/deployed links, 2 are marked private. Platform images are placeholder (directory empty).
